Skill Path: Fieldcraft

You craftsmanship is especially great when repairing equipment.

While developing your skills in Crafting you chose to focus specifically on Fieldcraft, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.3HChkcD1IRqv4DbA]{Improvise Tool}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ASy9AKEIRxPYUi5o]{Quick Repair}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{Snare Crafting}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.3HChkcD1IRqv4DbA]{Improvise Tool}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ASy9AKEIRxPYUi5o]{Quick Repair}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{Snare Crafting}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xT593tHyPkumPuzz]{Improvised Repair}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.vWtPxwND60EpxBAU]{Tweak Appearances}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.x9xA8P2Vlz98He7C]{Rapid Affixture}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.v62QzTwHOT3t86cL]{Craft Anything}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.VRCBTEyrcBf7auGz]{Legendary Tattoo Artist}
